assertions.title: Canonical frontend portal docs tree exists and is navigable

steps.expected: Entrypoint exists with portal matrix listing six exact portals and standard file set requirement
steps.observed: README.md present (3922 bytes). Lists exactly six portal folders: superadmin, tenant-admin, accounting, sales, factory, dealer-client. Documents the 7-file standard set: README.md, routes.md, api-contracts.md, workflows.md, role-boundaries.md, states-and-errors.md, playwright-journeys.md

steps.action: LS docs/frontend-portals/ to verify six portal folders
steps.observed: All six directories confirmed: superadmin/, tenant-admin/, accounting/, sales/, factory/, dealer-client/. Also contains portal-matrix.md and README.md at root level.

steps.action: LS each portal directory for standard file set
steps.expected: Each portal has exactly 7 standard files
steps.observed: superadmin: 7 files ✓ | tenant-admin: 7 files ✓ | accounting: 7 files ✓ | sales: 7 files ✓ | factory: 7 files ✓ | dealer-client: 7 files ✓. All portals have README.md, routes.md, api-contracts.md, workflows.md, role-boundaries.md, states-and-errors.md, playwright-journeys.md

steps.action: Grep portal README for bootstrap and tenant-scope rules
steps.observed: Line 29: 'Use GET /api/v1/auth/me as the only frontend identity bootstrap'. Lines 30, 64, 65: companyCode referenced for tenant scope.

evidence.portalMatrixCoverage: README.md contains folder ownership table with all 6 portals mapping owns/must-not-own boundaries
evidence.bootstrapReference: README.md line 29 explicitly states 'Use GET /api/v1/auth/me as the only frontend identity bootstrap'
evidence.tenantScopeReference: README.md line 30 explicitly states 'Persist tenant scope as companyCode, never companyId'

assertions.title: Shared frontend API contract pack exists and documents current shared rules

steps.expected: Index file present with links to shared topic files
steps.observed: README.md present (4205 bytes). Contains purpose section, current mainline rules, shared topic files table with 6 entries, retired routes table, validation section.

steps.action: Grep for GET /api/v1/auth/me as sole bootstrap
steps.observed: Line 21: 'Only bootstrap endpoint: GET /api/v1/auth/me is the sole supported frontend identity surface. This endpoint returns claim/context-derived data and requires a valid JWT bearer token.'

steps.action: Grep for companyCode as tenant scope
steps.expected: companyCode documented as the tenant scope identifier
steps.observed: Line 28: 'Tenant identifier: Use companyCode as the persisted tenant scope identifier in frontend state, localStorage, and API calls.' Also lines 61-62 in retired routes table showing companyId/X-Company-Id as retired.

steps.expected: Retired routes explicitly documented with replacements
steps.observed: Section '## Retired Routes' at line 54. Table lists: GET /api/v1/auth/profile → use /api/v1/auth/me; X-Company-Id header → use X-Company-Code; companyId in frontend state → use companyCode. Also line 22 explicitly warns 'Do not use: /api/v1/auth/profile — this endpoint is retired'.

steps.action: Verify shared topic files exist and are linked
steps.expected: All 6 shared topic files present in directory and linked from README
steps.observed: README lines 47-52 link all 6 files: auth-and-company-scope.md, idempotency-and-errors.md, pagination-and-filters.md, exports-and-approvals.md, accounting-reference-chains.md, dto-examples.md. Directory listing confirms all 6 files present.

evidence.bootstrapGuidance: Line 21 explicitly documents GET /api/v1/auth/me as sole bootstrap endpoint
evidence.tenantScopeGuidance: Line 28 explicitly documents companyCode as tenant scope; retired routes table (lines 60-62) shows companyId and X-Company-Id as retired
evidence.retiredRouteWarnings: Section '## Retired Routes' (line 54+) with table listing retired route, header, and state identifier with their replacements. Also inline warnings at lines 22 and 29.
evidence.sharedTopicLinks: README lines 47-52 provide markdown links to all 6 shared topic files. All 6 files confirmed present in directory.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-MAIN-001: docs/frontend-portals/README.md is the canonical entrypoint with all 6 portal folders (superadmin, tenant-admin, accounting, sales, factory, dealer-client) each containing the full 7-file standard set (42/42 files). VAL-MAIN-002: docs/frontend-api/README.md is present and links all 6 shared topic files, documents GET /api/v1/auth/me as sole bootstrap, companyCode as tenant scope, and retired-route warnings with explicit replacements.
